Class CliTestSupport

java.lang.Object
edu.iu.test.CliTestSupport
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.BeforeEachCallback, org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.Extension
public class CliTestSupport extends Object implements org.junit.jupiter.api.extension.BeforeEachCallback
Replaces System.out and System.err with an ByteArrayOutputStream for inspecting console output, and provides input(String) for providing console input, for CLI utility testing.
